_comment: License allowlist gate config (PARANOID). A PRODUCTION dependency whose license is not in `allowedSpdx` — including UNKNOWN/Custom — FAILS, unless (1) a `licenseOverrides` correction, (2) its exact NAME is in `exemptions`, or (3) its name matches an `exemptionPrefixes` entry. Read by scripts/license-check.mjs. Plain JSON — no comments; document with _-prefixed string keys.

exemptions.reason: web3.js v4 (ChainSafe) packages are LGPL-3.0. Accepted weak-copyleft for read-only chain access; revisit by migrating to viem (the org default) to drop this cluster.

exemptionPrefixes.reason: Next.js image-optimizer native lib (libvips) via next > sharp. Dynamically-loaded native binary, not statically combined with our JS. Package name varies by OS/arch (darwin-arm64 locally, linux-x64 on CI), so a narrow publisher-controlled prefix is used.
